rationale: No qualitative shift this cycle — Iran deal remains unresolved, Israel-Lebanon strikes continue, and the Russia-Ukraine war background is unchanged; energy price uncertainty persists for Polish households.

top_events.title: Israel strikes Lebanon; Iran claims US deal near but uncertain
top_events.summary: A potential US-Iran deal could ease energy prices for Poland, but ongoing Lebanon strikes and deal uncertainty keep the situation unresolved. No qualitative breakthrough yet.

top_events.title: Anthropic AI tools suspended for foreign nationals by US order
top_events.summary: US government restricts Anthropic AI access for non-US users, with minor indirect relevance to Polish tech and business users relying on these tools.

top_events.title: US kills Tren de Aragua gang leader in airstrike
top_events.summary: Distant event with no meaningful impact on Polish daily life or regional security.
